Notes: CU bench technical at 13:32/2nd half and 1:35/2nd half resulting coach Fessler
disqualification. #3 Nakia Carlisle of CU technical at 1:35/2nd half.
CU #21 Katie LaViolette fouled out at 1:09/2nd half.
Game.Officials: Ben Franson,  Marty Heine,  Randy Waagmeester
